citation: 12 CFR §1026.43(e)(2) - first-lien tier boundary at $66,156 (inclusive lower bound on mid band)
comment: Hand-calc: loan_amount = exactly $66,156. Bands: low = `< 66156`; mid = `66156 <= x < 110260`. So $66,156 is in MID band -> first-lien mid threshold = 3.5 pp. apr=0.0900, apor=0.0500 -> spread = 4.00 pp > 3.5 pp -> general_qm_passes=False. Pins the inclusive-lower-bound semantic on tier boundaries (LOCKED DECISION in module docstring).
